WELCOME_TITLE: Welcome to DS Nursing Online Class
WELCOME_DESC: We are ready to help you with class information and registration.
MAIN_MENU_PROMPT: Please choose one of the following options:
CONTACT_DESC:
For detailed information and personal assistance with registration, payment, class access, or any other questions, please contact our class admin through the Telegram account below.

We are ready to support you throughout the process.
FAQ_A1: Select 'Register for a Class', choose your class, submit your details, then follow the payment instructions.
FAQ_A2: After registration, the bot will send the bank account details. Once you pay, send your payment screenshot for review.
FAQ_Q3: When will I get access to the class?
FAQ_A3: After your payment is verified, you will receive the private class link or invitation.
FAQ_Q4: Who do I contact for help?
FAQ_A4: Use the 'Contact Admin' menu option to reach the support team.
CLASS_PROMPT: Which class would you like to register for?
NEXT_STEP_REGISTRATION: The registration form will be added next.
REG_ASK_DEPARTMENT: Please enter your department or field of study.
REG_SUCCESS: Your registration details have been received successfully.
REG_INVALID_PHONE: Please enter a valid Ethiopian phone number. Example: 0912345678, 0712345678, or +251912345678.
REG_HANDOFF_DESC: Your registration has been recorded successfully. A class assistant will help you continue the next steps.
REG_CONTACT_ADMIN: Please contact the admin on Telegram:
ADMIN_NOT_AUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
STUDENT_STATUS_CONTACTED: Your registration is now being handled by the class admin. Please check your Telegram messages and continue the next steps.
STUDENT_STATUS_PAYMENT_PENDING: Your registration is awaiting payment confirmation.
STUDENT_STATUS_PAID: Your payment has been recorded successfully.
STUDENT_STATUS_JOINED: Congratulations! You have now received permission to access the private Telegram group account. You have been registered as a participant in the class.
STUDENT_STATUS_CANCELLED: Your registration has been cancelled. Please contact the admin if this was a mistake.
FORM_CANCELLED: Registration cancelled. You have been returned to the main menu.
REG_CONFIRM_ACTION: Choose one of the options below.
